title: Perforated Cable Trays — KR Power
content: Perforated trays in MS/PG with ventilation holes. Strength: Light/Medium/Heavy. Width 50–1200 mm, Height 25–150 mm, Thickness 1.6/2.0/2.5 mm, Length 2500/3000 mm. Finish: HDG (IS 2629/2633/4759), Painted, Powder Coated.

title: Ladder Cable Trays — KR Power
content: Heavy-duty distribution. Width 50–1200 mm; Side channel 50–150 mm; Rung width 30–50 mm; C-C 250/300 mm; Thickness 1.6/2.0/2.5 mm; Length 2500/3000 mm. Finish: HDG/ Painted / Powder Coated.

title: Cable Trays Manufacturer — KR Power
content: GI, SS, Powder Coated — perforated and ladder. Coupler holes for easy joining; ventilation; customizable sizes; OEM support.
